uintptr_t objects = BaseNetworkable::objects_basenetworkable(Cache::gameAssembly);uintptr_t camera = Camera::GetMainCamera(Cache::gameAssembly); if (!objects) {    std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::seconds(2));    continue;} int entityCount = BaseNetworkable::size_basenetworkable(objects);std::vector<PlayerData> tempPlayers; for (int i = 0; i < entityCount; i++) {    uintptr_t entity = BaseNetworkable::entity_basenetworkable(objects, i);    if (!entity) continue;     std::string className = BaseNetworkable::GetClassName(entity);     if (className != miggerencstr("BasePlayer").decrypt() &&        className.find("Player") == std::string::npos)        continue;     BasePlayer bp(entity);     PlayerData data = {};    data.address = entity;    data.visualState = bp.GetVisualState();    data.position = bp.GetPosition();    data.name = bp.GetName();     if (data.name.empty()) data.name = "Unknown";     data.isSleeping = bp.IsSleeping();    data.isDead = !bp.IsAlive();    data.isValid = true;     tempPlayers.push_back(data);}

class BaseNetworkable {public:      static uintptr_t objects_basenetworkable(uintptr_t gameAssembly) {        if (!gameAssembly) return 0;        uintptr_t typeInfo = mem.Read<uintptr_t>(gameAssembly + 0xE1FCD80);        if (!typeInfo) return 0;        uintptr_t get_klass = mem.Read<uintptr_t>(typeInfo + 0xB8);        if (!get_klass) return 0;        uintptr_t client_entities = mem.Read<uintptr_t>(get_klass + 0x18);        if (!client_entities) return 0;        uintptr_t decrypt_list = Decrypt::BaseNetworkableKey(client_entities);        if (!decrypt_list) return 0;        uintptr_t entity_list = mem.Read<uintptr_t>(decrypt_list + 0x10);        if (!entity_list) return 0;        uintptr_t decrypt_ptr = Decrypt::DecryptList(entity_list);        if (!decrypt_ptr) return 0;        return mem.Read<uintptr_t>(decrypt_ptr + 0x10);    }     static int size_basenetworkable(uintptr_t obj) {        if (!obj) return 0;        return mem.Read<int>(obj + 0x18);    }     static uintptr_t entity_basenetworkable(uintptr_t obj, int i) {        if (!obj) return 0;        uintptr_t data = mem.Read<uintptr_t>(obj + 0x10);        if (!data) return 0;        return mem.Read<uintptr_t>(data + 0x20 + (i * 8));    }     static std::string GetClassName(uintptr_t entity) {        if (!entity) return "";        uintptr_t pKlass = mem.Read<uintptr_t>(entity);        if (!pKlass) return "";        uintptr_t pName = mem.Read<uintptr_t>(pKlass + 0x10);        if (!pName) return "";        return mem.ReadStringA(pName);    }};
